[TOOL CALL]
exec(const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/artifact-service/package.json\n+{\n+  \"name\": \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\",\n+  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n+  \"private\": true,\n+  \"type\": \"module\",\n+  \"exports\": \"./dist/index.js\",\n+  \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n+  \"dependencies\": {\n+    \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/persistence\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/schemas\": \"workspace:*\"\n+  }\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/artifact-service/tsconfig.json\n+{\n+  \"extends\": \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n+  \"compilerOptions\": { \"rootDir\": \"src\", \"outDir\": \"dist\", \"tsBuildInfoFile\": \"dist/.tsbuildinfo\" },\n+  \"include\": [\"src/**/*.ts\"],\n+  \"references\": [{ \"path\": \"../audit-service\" }, { \"path\": \"../persistence\" }, { \"path\": \"../schemas\" }]\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/artifact-service/src/index.ts\n+import { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\n+import { mkdir, readFile, readdir, realpath, stat } from \"node:fs/promises\";\n+import { extname, relative, resolve } from \"node:path\";\n+import { digest } from \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\";\n+import type { WorkspaceDatabase } from \"@gpt-dev/persistence\";\n+import { WorkspaceError } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+\n+const MEDIA_TYPES: Record<string, string> = {\n+  \".png\": \"image/png\", \".jpg\": \"image/jpeg\", \".jpeg\": \"image/jpeg\", \".webp\": \"image/webp\",\n+  \".html\": \"text/html\", \".json\": \"application/json\", \".zip\": \"application/zip\", \".txt\": \"text/plain\"\n+};\n+\n+export interface ArtifactRecord {\n+  id: string;\n+  taskId: string;\n+  relativePath: string;\n+  mediaType: string;\n+  bytes: number;\n+  sha256: string;\n+  createdAt: string;\n+}\n+\n+export class ArtifactService {\n+  constructor(private readonly database: WorkspaceDatabase, private readonly root: string) {}\n+\n+  async taskDirectory(taskId: string): Promise<string> {\n+    const path = resolve(this.root, taskId);\n+    await mkdir(path, { recursive: true, mode: 0o750 });\n+    return path;\n+  }\n+\n+  async index(taskId: string, maxFiles = 200): Promise<ArtifactRecord[]> {\n+    const root = await realpath(await this.taskDirectory(taskId));\n+    const records: ArtifactRecord[] = [];\n+    const walk = async (directory: string): Promise<void> => {\n+      for (const entry of await readdir(directory, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n+        if (records.length >= maxFiles) return;\n+        const path = resolve(directory, entry.name);\n+        if (entry.isDirectory()) await walk(path);\n+        else if (entry.isFile()) {\n+          const info = await stat(path);\n+          const bytes = await readFile(path);\n+          const record: ArtifactRecord = {\n+            id: randomUUID(), taskId, relativePath: relative(root, path),\n+            mediaType: MEDIA_TYPES[extname(path).toLowerCase()] ?? \"application/octet-stream\",\n+            bytes: info.size, sha256: digest(bytes.toString(\"base64\")), createdAt: new Date().toISOString()\n+          };\n+          this.database.db.prepare(`\n+            INSERT INTO artifacts (id, task_id, relative_path, media_type, bytes, sha256, created_at)\n+            VALUES (@id, @taskId, @relativePath, @mediaType, @bytes, @sha256, @createdAt)\n+            ON CONFLICT(task_id, relative_path) DO UPDATE SET media_type=excluded.media_type,\n+              bytes=excluded.bytes, sha256=excluded.sha256, created_at=excluded.created_at\n+          `).run(record);\n+          records.push(record);\n+        }\n+      }\n+    };\n+    await walk(root);\n+    return records;\n+  }\n+\n+  list(taskId: string): ArtifactRecord[] {\n+    return this.database.db.prepare(`\n+      SELECT id, task_id AS taskId, relative_path AS relativePath, media_type AS mediaType,\n+             bytes, sha256, created_at AS createdAt FROM artifacts WHERE task_id=? ORDER BY relative_path\n+    `).all(taskId) as ArtifactRecord[];\n+  }\n+\n+  async read(taskId: string, requested: string, maxBytes = 10_000_000): Promise<Buffer> {\n+    const root = await realpath(await this.taskDirectory(taskId));\n+    const path = await realpath(resolve(root, requested));\n+    if (!path.startsWith(`${root}/`)) throw new WorkspaceError(\"FORBIDDEN\", \"Artifact path escapes task directory\");\n+    const info = await stat(path);\n+    if (info.size > maxBytes) throw new WorkspaceError(\"VALIDATION\", \"Artifact is too large\");\n+    return readFile(path);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/sandbox-runner/package.json\n+{\n+  \"name\": \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\",\n+  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n+  \"private\": true,\n+  \"type\": \"module\",\n+  \"exports\": \"./dist/index.js\",\n+  \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n+  \"dependencies\": {\n+    \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/schemas\": \"workspace:*\"\n+  }\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/sandbox-runner/tsconfig.json\n+{\n+  \"extends\": \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n+  \"compilerOptions\": { \"rootDir\": \"src\", \"outDir\": \"dist\", \"tsBuildInfoFile\": \"dist/.tsbuildinfo\" },\n+  \"include\": [\"src/**/*.ts\"],\n+  \"references\": [{ \"path\": \"../audit-service\" }, { \"path\": \"../schemas\" }]\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/sandbox-runner/src/index.ts\n+import { spawn } from \"node:child_process\";\n+import { stat } from \"node:fs/promises\";\n+import { redactSecrets } from \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\";\n+import type { NetworkMode } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+import { WorkspaceError } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+\n+export interface SandboxLimits {\n+  memory: string;\n+  cpus: number;\n+  pids: number;\n+  timeoutSeconds: number;\n+  maxOutputBytes: number;\n+}\n+\n+export interface SandboxRequest {\n+  taskId: string;\n+  image: string;\n+  executable: string;\n+  args: string[];\n+  worktreePath: string;\n+  artifactPath: string;\n+  network: NetworkMode;\n+  limits: SandboxLimits;\n+}\n+\n+export interface SandboxResult {\n+  containerId: string;\n+  exitCode: number;\n+  timedOut: boolean;\n+  outputTruncated: boolean;\n+}\n+\n+export interface SandboxCallbacks {\n+  onContainer(containerId: string): void;\n+  onLog(stream: \"stdout\" | \"stderr\", content: string): void;\n+}\n+\n+async function docker(args: string[], allowFailure = false): Promise<string> {\n+  return await new Promise((resolvePromise, reject) => {\n+    const child = spawn(\"docker\", args, { stdio: [\"ignore\", \"pipe\", \"pipe\"] });\n+    let stdout = \"\";\n+    let stderr = \"\";\n+    child.stdout.setEncoding(\"utf8\").on(\"data\", (chunk: string) => { stdout += chunk; });\n+    child.stderr.setEncoding(\"utf8\").on(\"data\", (chunk: string) => { stderr += chunk; });\n+    child.on(\"error\", reject);\n+    child.on(\"close\", (code) => {\n+      if (code === 0 || allowFailure) resolvePromise(stdout.trim());\n+      else reject(new WorkspaceError(\"EXECUTION_FAILED\", redactSecrets(stderr.trim() || `docker exited ${String(code)}`)));\n+    });\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+export class DockerSandboxRunner {\n+  private readonly active = new Map<string, string>();\n+\n+  async health(): Promise<{ ok: boolean; version?: string; error?: string }> {\n+    try {\n+      return { ok: true, version: await docker([\"version\", \"--format\", \"{{.Server.Version}}\"] ) };\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      return { ok: false, error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) };\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  async run(request: SandboxRequest, callbacks: SandboxCallbacks): Promise<SandboxResult> {\n+    if (request.network !== \"none\") {\n+      throw new WorkspaceError(\"FORBIDDEN\", \"Networked task execution requires a separately approved policy\");\n+    }\n+    const workspaceStat = await stat(request.worktreePath);\n+    const uid = typeof workspaceStat.uid === \"number\" ? workspaceStat.uid : 1000;\n+    const gid = typeof workspaceStat.gid === \"number\" ? workspaceStat.gid : 1000;\n+    const name = `gptdev-${request.taskId}`;\n+    const createArgs = [\n+      \"create\", \"--name\", name,\n+      \"--network\", \"none\",\n+      \"--read-only\",\n+      \"--cap-drop\", \"ALL\",\n+      \"--security-opt\", \"no-new-privileges:true\",\n+      \"--memory\", request.limits.memory,\n+      \"--cpus\", String(request.limits.cpus),\n+      \"--pids-limit\", String(request.limits.pids),\n+      \"--user\", `${uid}:${gid}`,\n+      \"--env\", \"HOME=/tmp\",\n+      \"--tmpfs\", \"/tmp:rw,nosuid,nodev,noexec,size=256m\",\n+      \"--workdir\", \"/workspace\",\n+      \"--mount\", `type=bind,source=${request.worktreePath},target=/workspace`,\n+      \"--mount\", `type=bind,source=${request.artifactPath},target=/artifacts`,\n+      request.image,\n+      request.executable,\n+      ...request.args\n+    ];\n+    await docker([\"rm\", \"--force\", name], true);\n+    const containerId = await docker(createArgs);\n+    this.active.set(request.taskId, containerId);\n+    callbacks.onContainer(containerId);\n+    let totalBytes = 0;\n+    let outputTruncated = false;\n+    let timedOut = false;\n+    const exitCode = await new Promise<number>((resolvePromise, reject) => {\n+      const child = spawn(\"docker\", [\"start\", \"--attach\", containerId], { stdio: [\"ignore\", \"pipe\", \"pipe\"] });\n+      const consume = (stream: \"stdout\" | \"stderr\") => (chunk: Buffer): void => {\n+        if (totalBytes >= request.limits.maxOutputBytes) { outputTruncated = true; return; }\n+        const remaining = request.limits.maxOutputBytes - totalBytes;\n+        const sliced = chunk.subarray(0, remaining);\n+        totalBytes += sliced.byteLength;\n+        callbacks.onLog(stream, redactSecrets(sliced.toString(\"utf8\")));\n+        if (sliced.byteLength < chunk.byteLength) outputTruncated = true;\n+      };\n+      child.stdout.on(\"data\", consume(\"stdout\"));\n+      child.stderr.on(\"data\", consume(\"stderr\"));\n+      child.on(\"error\", reject);\n+      const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n+        timedOut = true;\n+        void docker([\"stop\", \"--time\", \"2\", containerId], true);\n+      }, request.limits.timeoutSeconds * 1000);\n+      child.on(\"close\", async () => {\n+        clearTimeout(timer);\n+        try {\n+          const inspected = await docker([\"inspect\", \"--format\", \"{{.State.ExitCode}}\", containerId]);\n+          resolvePromise(Number.parseInt(inspected, 10));\n+        } catch (error) { reject(error); }\n+      });\n+    });\n+    this.active.delete(request.taskId);\n+    await docker([\"rm\", \"--force\", containerId], true);\n+    return { containerId, exitCode, timedOut, outputTruncated };\n+  }\n+\n+  async cancel(taskId: string): Promise<void> {\n+    const containerId = this.active.get(taskId);\n+    if (!containerId) throw new WorkspaceError(\"CONFLICT\", \"Task has no active container\");\n+    await docker([\"stop\", \"--time\", \"2\", containerId], true);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/task-service/package.json\n+{\n+  \"name\": \"@gpt-dev/task-service\",\n+  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n+  \"private\": true,\n+  \"type\": \"module\",\n+  \"exports\": \"./dist/index.js\",\n+  \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n+  \"dependencies\": {\n+    \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/persistence\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/schemas\": \"workspace:*\"\n+  }\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/task-service/tsconfig.json\n+{\n+  \"extends\": \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n+  \"compilerOptions\": { \"rootDir\": \"src\", \"outDir\": \"dist\", \"tsBuildInfoFile\": \"dist/.tsbuildinfo\" },\n+  \"include\": [\"src/**/*.ts\"],\n+  \"references\": [\n+    { \"path\": \"../artifact-service\" }, { \"path\": \"../audit-service\" }, { \"path\": \"../persistence\" },\n+    { \"path\": \"../sandbox-runner\" }, { \"path\": \"../schemas\" }\n+  ]\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/task-service/src/index.ts\n+import { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\n+import type { ArtifactService } from \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\";\n+import { redactSecrets } from \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\";\n+import type { WorkspaceDatabase } from \"@gpt-dev/persistence\";\n+import type { DockerSandboxRunner, SandboxLimits } from \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\";\n+import type { NetworkMode, TaskStatus } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+import { WorkspaceError } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+\n+export interface TaskRecord {\n+  id: string;\n+  projectId: string;\n+  worktreePath: string;\n+  status: TaskStatus;\n+  image?: string;\n+  containerId?: string;\n+  exitCode?: number;\n+  startedAt?: string;\n+  finishedAt?: string;\n+  createdAt: string;\n+  error?: string;\n+}\n+\n+export interface StartTaskInput {\n+  projectId: string;\n+  worktreePath: string;\n+  image: string;\n+  executable: string;\n+  args: string[];\n+  network: NetworkMode;\n+  limits: SandboxLimits;\n+}\n+\n+export class TaskService {\n+  private readonly running = new Map<string, Promise<void>>();\n+\n+  constructor(\n+    private readonly database: WorkspaceDatabase,\n+    private readonly runner: DockerSandboxRunner,\n+    private readonly artifacts: ArtifactService\n+  ) {}\n+\n+  reconcileInterrupted(): number {\n+    const result = this.database.db.prepare(`\n+      UPDATE tasks SET status='interrupted', finished_at=?, error='Gateway restarted while task was active'\n+      WHERE status IN ('queued','preparing','running')\n+    `).run(new Date().toISOString());\n+    return result.changes;\n+  }\n+\n+  async start(input: StartTaskInput): Promise<TaskRecord> {\n+    const id = randomUUID();\n+    const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();\n+    this.database.db.prepare(`\n+      INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, worktree_path, status, image, command_json, created_at)\n+      VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?)\n+    `).run(id, input.projectId, input.worktreePath, input.image, JSON.stringify([input.executable, ...input.args]), createdAt);\n+    const promise = this.execute(id, input).finally(() => this.running.delete(id));\n+    this.running.set(id, promise);\n+    return this.get(id);\n+  }\n+\n+  private async execute(taskId: string, input: StartTaskInput): Promise<void> {\n+    let sequence = 0;\n+    const update = (status: TaskStatus, extra: Record<string, unknown> = {}): void => {\n+      const assignments = [\"status=@status\", ...Object.keys(extra).map((key) => `${key}=@${key}`)];\n+      this.database.db.prepare(`UPDATE tasks SET ${assignments.join(\", \")} WHERE id=@id`).run({ id: taskId, status, ...extra });\n+    };\n+    try {\n+      update(\"preparing\", { started_at: new Date().toISOString() });\n+      const artifactPath = await this.artifacts.taskDirectory(taskId);\n+      update(\"running\");\n+      const result = await this.runner.run({ taskId, artifactPath, ...input }, {\n+        onContainer: (containerId) => update(\"running\", { container_id: containerId }),\n+        onLog: (stream, content) => {\n+          sequence += 1;\n+          this.database.db.prepare(`\n+            INSERT INTO task_logs (task_id, sequence, stream, content, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n+          `).run(taskId, sequence, stream, redactSecrets(content), new Date().toISOString());\n+        }\n+      });\n+      await this.artifacts.index(taskId);\n+      update(result.timedOut ? \"timed_out\" : result.exitCode === 0 ? \"succeeded\" : \"failed\", {\n+        exit_code: result.exitCode,\n+        finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n+        error: result.outputTruncated ? \"Task output was truncated at the configured byte limit\" : null\n+      });\n+    } catch (error) {\n+      update(\"failed\", {\n+        finished_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n+        error: redactSecrets(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error))\n+      });\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  get(id: string): TaskRecord {\n+    const row = this.database.db.prepare(`\n+      SELECT id, project_id AS projectId, worktree_path AS worktreePath, status, image,\n+        container_id AS containerId, exit_code AS exitCode, started_at AS startedAt,\n+        finished_at AS finishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, error FROM tasks WHERE id=?\n+    `).get(id) as TaskRecord | undefined;\n+    if (!row) throw new WorkspaceError(\"NOT_FOUND\", `Unknown task: ${id}`);\n+    return row;\n+  }\n+\n+  list(projectId?: string, limit = 100): TaskRecord[] {\n+    const sql = projectId\n+      ? `SELECT id, project_id AS projectId, worktree_path AS worktreePath, status, image,\n+          container_id AS containerId, exit_code AS exitCode, started_at AS startedAt,\n+          finished_at AS finishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, error\n+         FROM tasks WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?`\n+      : `SELECT id, project_id AS projectId, worktree_path AS worktreePath, status, image,\n+          container_id AS containerId, exit_code AS exitCode, started_at AS startedAt,\n+          finished_at AS finishedAt, created_at AS createdAt, error\n+         FROM tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT ?`;\n+    return (projectId ? this.database.db.prepare(sql).all(projectId, limit) : this.database.db.prepare(sql).all(limit)) as TaskRecord[];\n+  }\n+\n+  logs(taskId: string, cursor = 0, maxBytes = 65536): { entries: Array<{ sequence: number; stream: string; content: string; createdAt: string }>; nextCursor: number } {\n+    this.get(taskId);\n+    const rows = this.database.db.prepare(`\n+      SELECT sequence, stream, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM task_logs\n+      WHERE task_id=? AND sequence>? ORDER BY sequence LIMIT 1000\n+    `).all(taskId, cursor) as Array<{ sequence: number; stream: string; content: string; createdAt: string }>;\n+    let bytes = 0;\n+    const entries = rows.filter((row) => {\n+      const size = Buffer.byteLength(row.content);\n+      if (bytes + size > maxBytes) return false;\n+      bytes += size;\n+      return true;\n+    });\n+    return { entries, nextCursor: entries.at(-1)?.sequence ?? cursor };\n+  }\n+\n+  async cancel(taskId: string): Promise<TaskRecord> {\n+    const task = this.get(taskId);\n+    if (task.status !== \"running\" && task.status !== \"preparing\") throw new WorkspaceError(\"CONFLICT\", \"Task is not cancellable\");\n+    await this.runner.cancel(taskId);\n+    this.database.db.prepare(\"UPDATE tasks SET status='cancelled', finished_at=? WHERE id=?\").run(new Date().toISOString(), taskId);\n+    return this.get(taskId);\n+  }\n+}\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
)

exec(const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/persistence/src/index.ts\n@@\n       CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\n@@\n         FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id)\n       );\n+      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS worktrees (\n+        task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n+        project_id TEXT NOT NULL,\n+        path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n+        branch TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n+        status TEXT NOT NULL,\n+        created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n+        FOREIGN KEY(project_id) REFERENCES projects(id)\n+      );\n*** Update File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/task-service/src/index.ts\n@@\n export interface StartTaskInput {\n+  taskId?: string;\n@@\n   async start(input: StartTaskInput): Promise<TaskRecord> {\n-    const id = randomUUID();\n+    const id = input.taskId ?? randomUUID();\n@@\n-    const promise = this.execute(id, input).finally(() => this.running.delete(id));\n+    const { taskId: _taskId, ...executionInput } = input;\n+    const promise = this.execute(id, executionInput).finally(() => this.running.delete(id));\n*** Update File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/apps/mcp-gateway/package.json\n@@\n-  \"type\": \"module\"\n+  \"type\": \"module\",\n+  \"dependencies\": {\n+    \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/browser-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/git-service\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/persistence\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/projects\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/schemas\": \"workspace:*\",\n+    \"@gpt-dev/task-service\": \"workspace:*\"\n+  }\n }\n*** End Patch";

[TOOL CALL]
exec(const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/browser-service/package.json\n+{\n+  \"name\": \"@gpt-dev/browser-service\",\n+  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n+  \"private\": true,\n+  \"type\": \"module\",\n+  \"exports\": \"./dist/index.js\",\n+  \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n+  \"dependencies\": { \"@gpt-dev/schemas\": \"workspace:*\", \"zod\": \"4.4.3\" }\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/browser-service/tsconfig.json\n+{\n+  \"extends\": \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n+  \"compilerOptions\": { \"rootDir\": \"src\", \"outDir\": \"dist\", \"tsBuildInfoFile\": \"dist/.tsbuildinfo\" },\n+  \"include\": [\"src/**/*.ts\"],\n+  \"references\": [{ \"path\": \"../schemas\" }]\n+}\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/packages/browser-service/src/index.ts\n+import { writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\";\n+import { resolve } from \"node:path\";\n+import { z } from \"zod/v4\";\n+import { WorkspaceError } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+\n+export const BrowserAction = z.discriminatedUnion(\"type\", [\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"navigate\"), url: z.string().url() }),\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"click\"), selector: z.string().min(1).max(512) }),\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"fill\"), selector: z.string().min(1).max(512), value: z.string().max(4096) }),\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"press\"), selector: z.string().min(1).max(512), key: z.string().min(1).max(64) }),\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"wait\"), milliseconds: z.number().int().min(0).max(30_000) }),\n+  z.object({ type: z.literal(\"screenshot\"), name: z.string().regex(/^[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+\\.png$/) })\n+]);\n+\n+export type BrowserAction = z.infer<typeof BrowserAction>;\n+\n+function assertAllowedUrl(value: string, allowedHosts: Set<string>): void {\n+  const url = new URL(value);\n+  if (!new Set([\"http:\", \"https:\"]).has(url.protocol)) throw new WorkspaceError(\"FORBIDDEN\", \"Only HTTP(S) browser navigation is allowed\");\n+  if (!allowedHosts.has(url.hostname)) throw new WorkspaceError(\"FORBIDDEN\", `Browser host is not approved: ${url.hostname}`);\n+  if (url.username || url.password) throw new WorkspaceError(\"FORBIDDEN\", \"Credentials in browser URLs are forbidden\");\n+}\n+\n+export class BrowserService {\n+  async createScript(artifactDirectory: string, actions: BrowserAction[], allowedHosts: string[]): Promise<string> {\n+    if (actions.length > 100) throw new WorkspaceError(\"VALIDATION\", \"Too many browser actions\");\n+    const hosts = new Set(allowedHosts);\n+    for (const action of actions) if (action.type === \"navigate\") assertAllowedUrl(action.url, hosts);\n+    const serialized = JSON.stringify(actions);\n+    const script = `\n+import { chromium } from 'playwright';\n+import { writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises';\n+const actions = ${serialized};\n+const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true });\n+const page = await browser.newPage();\n+const events = { console: [], pageErrors: [], failedRequests: [], responses: [] };\n+page.on('console', m => events.console.push({ type: m.type(), text: m.text() }));\n+page.on('pageerror', e => events.pageErrors.push(String(e)));\n+page.on('requestfailed', r => events.failedRequests.push({ url: r.url(), error: r.failure()?.errorText }));\n+page.on('response', r => { if (r.status() >= 400) events.responses.push({ url: r.url(), status: r.status() }); });\n+await page.context().tracing.start({ screenshots: true, snapshots: true, sources: true });\n+for (const action of actions) {\n+  if (action.type === 'navigate') await page.goto(action.url, { waitUntil: 'networkidle', timeout: 30000 });\n+  else if (action.type === 'click') await page.locator(action.selector).click();\n+  else if (action.type === 'fill') await page.locator(action.selector).fill(action.value);\n+  else if (action.type === 'press') await page.locator(action.selector).press(action.key);\n+  else if (action.type === 'wait') await page.waitForTimeout(action.milliseconds);\n+  else if (action.type === 'screenshot') await page.screenshot({ path: '/artifacts/' + action.name, fullPage: true });\n+}\n+await page.context().tracing.stop({ path: '/artifacts/trace.zip' });\n+await writeFile('/artifacts/browser-events.json', JSON.stringify(events, null, 2));\n+await browser.close();\n+`;\n+    const path = resolve(artifactDirectory, \"browser-check.mjs\");\n+    await writeFile(path, script, { encoding: \"utf8\", mode: 0o640 });\n+    return path;\n+  }\n+}\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
)

[TOOL OUTPUT]
[{"type": "input_text", "text": "Script completed\nWall time 0.0 seconds\nOutput:\n"}, {"type": "input_text", "text": "{}"}]

[REASONING]
**Planning gateway file structure and tool audit**

[TOOL CALL]
exec(const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/apps/mcp-gateway/src/config.ts\n+import { resolve } from \"node:path\";\n+import { z } from \"zod/v4\";\n+\n+const Environment = z.object({\n+  NODE_ENV: z.enum([\"development\", \"test\", \"production\"]).default(\"development\"),\n+  HOST: z.string().default(\"127.0.0.1\"),\n+  PORT: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(65535).default(8081),\n+  MCP_PATH: z.string().startsWith(\"/\").default(\"/mcp\"),\n+  PUBLIC_BASE_URL: z.string().url().default(\"http://127.0.0.1:8081\"),\n+  WORKSPACE_ROOT: z.string().default(\"./fixtures/workspaces\"),\n+  WORKTREE_ROOT: z.string().default(\"./.state/worktrees\"),\n+  STATE_DIR: z.string().default(\"./.state\"),\n+  ARTIFACT_DIR: z.string().default(\"./.artifacts\"),\n+  DATABASE_URL: z.string().default(\"./.state/app.db\"),\n+  TASK_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: z.coerce.number().int().min(5).max(3600).default(900),\n+  TASK_MAX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: z.coerce.number().int().min(5).max(86400).default(3600),\n+  TASK_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES: z.coerce.number().int().min(1024).default(10_485_760),\n+  TASK_DEFAULT_MEMORY: z.string().regex(/^\\d+[kmg]$/i).default(\"2g\"),\n+  TASK_DEFAULT_CPUS: z.coerce.number().positive().max(64).default(2),\n+  TASK_DEFAULT_PIDS: z.coerce.number().int().min(16).max(32768).default(256),\n+  AUTH_MODE: z.enum([\"development\", \"oauth\"]).default(\"development\"),\n+  OAUTH_ISSUER: z.string().optional(),\n+  OAUTH_AUDIENCE: z.string().optional(),\n+  OAUTH_JWKS_URI: z.string().url().optional()\n+});\n+\n+export type Config = ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>;\n+\n+export function loadConfig(env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = process.env) {\n+  const parsed = Environment.parse(env);\n+  if (parsed.NODE_ENV === \"production\" && parsed.AUTH_MODE !== \"oauth\") {\n+    throw new Error(\"Production requires AUTH_MODE=oauth\");\n+  }\n+  if (parsed.AUTH_MODE === \"oauth\" && (!parsed.OAUTH_ISSUER || !parsed.OAUTH_AUDIENCE || !parsed.OAUTH_JWKS_URI)) {\n+    throw new Error(\"OAuth mode requires OAUTH_ISSUER, OAUTH_AUDIENCE and OAUTH_JWKS_URI\");\n+  }\n+  return {\n+    ...parsed,\n+    workspaceRoot: resolve(parsed.WORKSPACE_ROOT),\n+    worktreeRoot: resolve(parsed.WORKTREE_ROOT),\n+    stateDir: resolve(parsed.STATE_DIR),\n+    artifactDir: resolve(parsed.ARTIFACT_DIR),\n+    databasePath: resolve(parsed.DATABASE_URL)\n+  };\n+}\n+\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/apps/mcp-gateway/src/auth.ts\n+import type { FastifyRequest } from \"fastify\";\n+import { createRemoteJWKSet, jwtVerify } from \"jose\";\n+import type { Config } from \"./config.js\";\n+\n+export interface Principal {\n+  subject: string;\n+  scopes: string[];\n+}\n+\n+export class AuthService {\n+  private readonly jwks;\n+\n+  constructor(private readonly config: Config) {\n+    this.jwks = config.OAUTH_JWKS_URI ? createRemoteJWKSet(new URL(config.OAUTH_JWKS_URI)) : undefined;\n+  }\n+\n+  async authenticate(request: FastifyRequest, requiredScopes: string[] = []): Promise<Principal> {\n+    if (this.config.AUTH_MODE === \"development\") {\n+      const host = request.ip;\n+      if (!new Set([\"127.0.0.1\", \"::1\"]).has(host)) throw Object.assign(new Error(\"Development auth is loopback-only\"), { statusCode: 403 });\n+      return { subject: \"local-development\", scopes: [\"workspace.read\", \"workspace.write\", \"task.execute\", \"task.network\"] };\n+    }\n+    const header = request.headers.authorization;\n+    if (!header?.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) throw Object.assign(new Error(\"Bearer token required\"), { statusCode: 401 });\n+    if (!this.jwks || !this.config.OAUTH_ISSUER || !this.config.OAUTH_AUDIENCE) throw new Error(\"OAuth verifier is not configured\");\n+    const token = header.slice(\"Bearer \".length);\n+    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, this.jwks, {\n+      issuer: this.config.OAUTH_ISSUER,\n+      audience: this.config.OAUTH_AUDIENCE,\n+      algorithms: [\"RS256\", \"ES256\", \"EdDSA\"]\n+    });\n+    const scopes = typeof payload.scope === \"string\"\n+      ? payload.scope.split(/\\s+/).filter(Boolean)\n+      : Array.isArray(payload.scp) ? payload.scp.filter((scope): scope is string => typeof scope === \"string\") : [];\n+    if (!requiredScopes.every((scope) => scopes.includes(scope))) {\n+      throw Object.assign(new Error(\"Insufficient scope\"), { statusCode: 403 });\n+    }\n+    return { subject: payload.sub ?? \"unknown\", scopes };\n+  }\n+\n+  protectedResourceMetadata() {\n+    return {\n+      resource: `${this.config.PUBLIC_BASE_URL}${this.config.MCP_PATH}`,\n+      authorization_servers: this.config.OAUTH_ISSUER ? [this.config.OAUTH_ISSUER] : [],\n+      bearer_methods_supported: [\"header\"],\n+      scopes_supported: [\"workspace.read\", \"workspace.write\", \"task.execute\", \"task.network\"],\n+      resource_documentation: `${this.config.PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/docs/authentication`\n+    };\n+  }\n+}\n+\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/apps/mcp-gateway/src/tools.ts\n+import { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\n+import { z } from \"zod/v4\";\n+import { McpServer } from \"@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js\";\n+import { createAuditEvent } from \"@gpt-dev/audit-service\";\n+import type { ArtifactService } from \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\";\n+import type { GitService } from \"@gpt-dev/git-service\";\n+import type { WorkspaceDatabase } from \"@gpt-dev/persistence\";\n+import type { ProjectService } from \"@gpt-dev/projects\";\n+import type { DockerSandboxRunner } from \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\";\n+import { ProjectId, RelativePath, RunCommandInput, TaskId, WorkspaceError } from \"@gpt-dev/schemas\";\n+import type { TaskService } from \"@gpt-dev/task-service\";\n+import type { Config } from \"./config.js\";\n+\n+export interface Services {\n+  config: Config;\n+  database: WorkspaceDatabase;\n+  projects: ProjectService;\n+  git: GitService;\n+  runner: DockerSandboxRunner;\n+  tasks: TaskService;\n+  artifacts: ArtifactService;\n+}\n+\n+interface WorktreeRecord { taskId: string; projectId: string; path: string; branch: string; status: string; createdAt: string }\n+\n+function worktree(database: WorkspaceDatabase, projectId: string, taskId: string): WorktreeRecord {\n+  const row = database.db.prepare(`\n+    SELECT task_id AS taskId, project_id AS projectId, path, branch, status, created_at AS createdAt\n+    FROM worktrees WHERE task_id=? AND project_id=?\n+  `).get(taskId, projectId) as WorktreeRecord | undefined;\n+  if (!row) throw new WorkspaceError(\"NOT_FOUND\", \"Task worktree not found for project\");\n+  if (row.status !== \"active\") throw new WorkspaceError(\"CONFLICT\", `Worktree is ${row.status}`);\n+  return row;\n+}\n+\n+function content(value: unknown, isError = false) {\n+  return { content: [{ type: \"text\" as const, text: JSON.stringify(value, null, 2) }], isError };\n+}\n+\n+function registerAudit(services: Services, action: string, options: { projectId?: string; taskId?: string; destructive?: boolean; networked?: boolean; detail?: Record<string, unknown> } = {}): string {\n+  const event = createAuditEvent({\n+    action, actor: \"mcp-user\", destructive: options.destructive ?? false, networked: options.networked ?? false,\n+    detail: options.detail ?? {},\n+    ...(options.projectId ? { projectId: options.projectId } : {}),\n+    ...(options.taskId ? { taskId: options.taskId } : {})\n+  });\n+  services.database.recordAudit(event);\n+  return event.id;\n+}\n+\n+async function safely<T>(services: Services, action: string, options: Parameters<typeof registerAudit>[2], callback: () => Promise<T> | T) {\n+  const auditId = registerAudit(services, action, options);\n+  try {\n+    return content({ ok: true, data: await callback(), auditId });\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    const known = error instanceof WorkspaceError ? error : new WorkspaceError(\"INTERNAL\", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));\n+    return content({ ok: false, error: { code: known.code, message: known.message, retryable: known.retryable, details: known.details }, auditId }, true);\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function rootFor(services: Services, projectId: string, taskId?: string): string {\n+  return taskId ? worktree(services.database, projectId, taskId).path : services.projects.get(projectId).canonicalPath;\n+}\n+\n+export function createMcpServer(services: Services): McpServer {\n+  const server = new McpServer({ name: \"hetzner-dev-workspace\", version: \"0.1.0\" }, { capabilities: { logging: {} } });\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"system_health\", {\n+    description: \"Read gateway, SQLite, workspace and Docker runner health. Makes no changes.\",\n+    inputSchema: {}, annotations: { title: \"System health\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async () => safely(services, \"system_health\", {}, async () => ({\n+    gateway: \"ok\", database: services.database.db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get(), docker: await services.runner.health(),\n+    workspaceRoot: services.config.workspaceRoot, architecture: process.arch, uptimeSeconds: Math.floor(process.uptime())\n+  })));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"list_projects\", {\n+    description: \"List approved project IDs and metadata. Does not expose secrets or file contents.\",\n+    inputSchema: {}, annotations: { title: \"List projects\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async () => safely(services, \"list_projects\", {}, () => services.projects.list()));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"register_project\", {\n+    description: \"Register an existing approved Git checkout below the workspace root. Requires explicit approval for company or client data.\",\n+    inputSchema: { id: ProjectId, path: z.string().min(1), defaultBranch: z.string().min(1).default(\"main\"), runtime: z.enum([\"node\", \"python\", \"generic\"]).default(\"generic\") },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Register project\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: false, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"register_project\", { projectId: input.id }, () => services.projects.register({ id: input.id, canonicalPath: input.path, defaultBranch: input.defaultBranch, runtime: input.runtime })));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"project_tree\", {\n+    description: \"Return a bounded tree for an approved project or active task worktree.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId.optional(), path: z.string().default(\".\"), maxEntries: z.number().int().min(1).max(5000).default(1000), maxDepth: z.number().int().min(1).max(20).default(8) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Project tree\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"project_tree\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.projects.tree(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId), input.path, input.maxEntries, input.maxDepth)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"read_file\", {\n+    description: \"Read a bounded UTF-8 text file from an approved project or active task worktree. Rejects binaries and path escapes.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId.optional(), path: RelativePath, maxBytes: z.number().int().min(1).max(2_000_000).default(1_000_000) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Read file\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"read_file\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.projects.readText(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId), input.path, input.maxBytes)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"search_code\", {\n+    description: \"Search text with ripgrep inside an approved project or active task worktree. Results are bounded.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId.optional(), pattern: z.string().min(1).max(512), maxResults: z.number().int().min(1).max(1000).default(200) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Search code\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"search_code\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.projects.search(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId), input.pattern, input.maxResults)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"create_task_worktree\", {\n+    description: \"Create an isolated Git branch and worktree for a coding task. Canonical checkouts are not modified.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, slug: z.string().max(64).default(\"task\") },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Create task worktree\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: false, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"create_task_worktree\", { projectId: input.projectId }, async () => {\n+    const project = services.projects.get(input.projectId);\n+    const taskId = randomUUID();\n+    const created = await services.git.createWorktree(project.canonicalPath, project.id, taskId, input.slug);\n+    const record = { taskId, projectId: project.id, path: created.path, branch: created.branch, status: \"active\", createdAt: new Date().toISOString() };\n+    services.database.db.prepare(`INSERT INTO worktrees (task_id, project_id, path, branch, status, created_at) VALUES (@taskId,@projectId,@path,@branch,@status,@createdAt)`).run(record);\n+    return record;\n+  }));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"write_file\", {\n+    description: \"Create or replace a UTF-8 file atomically inside an active task worktree. Never writes to a canonical checkout.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId, path: RelativePath, content: z.string().max(2_000_000) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Write file\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: false, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"write_file\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, async () => {\n+    await services.projects.writeText(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId), input.path, input.content);\n+    return { path: input.path, bytes: Buffer.byteLength(input.content) };\n+  }));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"delete_path\", {\n+    description: \"Delete a file or directory only inside an active task worktree. This is destructive and cannot target the worktree root.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId, path: RelativePath },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Delete path\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"delete_path\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId, destructive: true }, async () => {\n+    await services.projects.remove(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId), input.path); return { deleted: input.path };\n+  }));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"git_status\", {\n+    description: \"Read Git status for an active task worktree.\", inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Git status\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"git_status\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.git.status(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId))));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"git_diff\", {\n+    description: \"Read the bounded Git diff for an active task worktree.\", inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Git diff\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"git_diff\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.git.diff(rootFor(services, input.projectId, input.taskId))));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"run_command\", {\n+    description: \"Start an asynchronous command inside a constrained disposable container mounted only to the task worktree and artifacts. Network is disabled by default.\",\n+    inputSchema: RunCommandInput,\n+    annotations: { title: \"Run sandboxed command\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: false, openWorldHint: true }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"run_command\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId, networked: input.network !== \"none\" }, async () => {\n+    if (!input.taskId) throw new WorkspaceError(\"VALIDATION\", \"taskId is required for execution\");\n+    const project = services.projects.get(input.projectId);\n+    const tree = worktree(services.database, input.projectId, input.taskId);\n+    const timeoutSeconds = Math.min(input.timeoutSeconds ?? services.config.TASK_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, services.config.TASK_MAX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS);\n+    const defaultImage = project.runtime === \"python\" ? \"gptdev-runner-python:local\" : \"gptdev-runner-node:local\";\n+    return services.tasks.start({ taskId: input.taskId, projectId: input.projectId, worktreePath: tree.path, image: input.image ?? defaultImage,\n+      executable: input.executable, args: input.args, network: input.network,\n+      limits: { memory: services.config.TASK_DEFAULT_MEMORY, cpus: services.config.TASK_DEFAULT_CPUS, pids: services.config.TASK_DEFAULT_PIDS, timeoutSeconds, maxOutputBytes: services.config.TASK_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES }\n+    });\n+  }));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"get_task\", {\n+    description: \"Read persistent task state.\", inputSchema: { taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Get task\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"get_task\", { taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.tasks.get(input.taskId)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"read_task_logs\", {\n+    description: \"Read cursor-based redacted logs for a task.\", inputSchema: { taskId: TaskId, cursor: z.number().int().min(0).default(0), maxBytes: z.number().int().min(1024).max(262144).default(65536) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Read task logs\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"read_task_logs\", { taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.tasks.logs(input.taskId, input.cursor, input.maxBytes)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"cancel_task\", {\n+    description: \"Cancel a running task and its complete container process tree.\", inputSchema: { taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Cancel task\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"cancel_task\", { taskId: input.taskId, destructive: true }, () => services.tasks.cancel(input.taskId)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"list_artifacts\", {\n+    description: \"List indexed task artifacts and hashes.\", inputSchema: { taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"List artifacts\", readOnlyHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"list_artifacts\", { taskId: input.taskId }, () => services.artifacts.list(input.taskId)));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"commit_task\", {\n+    description: \"Stage and commit all task-worktree changes after explicit user approval. Does not push or merge.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId, message: z.string().min(1).max(500) },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Commit task\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"commit_task\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId, destructive: true }, async () => {\n+    const tree = worktree(services.database, input.projectId, input.taskId);\n+    const commit = await services.git.commit(tree.path, input.message);\n+    services.database.db.prepare(\"UPDATE worktrees SET status='committed' WHERE task_id=?\").run(input.taskId);\n+    return { commit, branch: tree.branch };\n+  }));\n+\n+  server.registerTool(\"rollback_task\", {\n+    description: \"Permanently discard an uncommitted task worktree and delete its task branch. Audit logs and artifacts remain.\",\n+    inputSchema: { projectId: ProjectId, taskId: TaskId },\n+    annotations: { title: \"Roll back task\", readOnlyHint: false, destructiveHint: true, openWorldHint: false }\n+  }, async (input) => safely(services, \"rollback_task\", { projectId: input.projectId, taskId: input.taskId, destructive: true }, async () => {\n+    const tree = worktree(services.database, input.projectId, input.taskId);\n+    const task = services.database.db.prepare(\"SELECT status FROM tasks WHERE id=?\").get(input.taskId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n+    if (task && new Set([\"queued\", \"preparing\", \"running\"]).has(task.status)) throw new WorkspaceError(\"CONFLICT\", \"Stop the active task before rollback\");\n+    await services.git.discard(services.projects.get(input.projectId).canonicalPath, tree.path, tree.branch);\n+    services.database.db.prepare(\"UPDATE worktrees SET status='discarded' WHERE task_id=?\").run(input.taskId);\n+    return { discarded: true, branch: tree.branch };\n+  }));\n+\n+  return server;\n+}\n+\n*** Add File: /Users/macbookprom116gb/Downloads/sam.gov/docs/design-handoff-screens/hetzner_mcp/apps/mcp-gateway/src/server.ts\n+import { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\n+import Fastify from \"fastify\";\n+import { isInitializeRequest } from \"@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js\";\n+import { StreamableHTTPServerTransport } from \"@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/streamableHttp.js\";\n+import type { McpServer } from \"@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js\";\n+import { ArtifactService } from \"@gpt-dev/artifact-service\";\n+import { GitService } from \"@gpt-dev/git-service\";\n+import { WorkspaceDatabase } from \"@gpt-dev/persistence\";\n+import { ProjectService } from \"@gpt-dev/projects\";\n+import { DockerSandboxRunner } from \"@gpt-dev/sandbox-runner\";\n+import { TaskService } from \"@gpt-dev/task-service\";\n+import { AuthService } from \"./auth.js\";\n+import { loadConfig } from \"./config.js\";\n+import { createMcpServer } from \"./tools.js\";\n+\n+const config = loadConfig();\n+const database = new WorkspaceDatabase(config.databasePath);\n+const projects = new ProjectService(database);\n+const git = new GitService(config.worktreeRoot);\n+const runner = new DockerSandboxRunner();\n+const artifacts = new ArtifactService(database, config.artifactDir);\n+const tasks = new TaskService(database, runner, artifacts);\n+const interrupted = tasks.reconcileInterrupted();\n+const services = { config, database, projects, git, runner, tasks, artifacts };\n+const auth = new AuthService(config);\n+const app = Fastify({ logger: { level: config.NODE_ENV === \"production\" ? \"info\" : \"debug\", redact: [\"req.headers.authorization\"] }, trustProxy: true, bodyLimit: 2_000_000 });\n+\n+interface Session { server: McpServer; transport: StreamableHTTPServerTransport }\n+const sessions = new Map<string, Session>();\n+\n+app.get(\"/healthz\", async () => ({ status: \"ok\", docker: await runner.health(), interruptedTasksReconciled: interrupted }));\n+app.get(\"/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource\", async () => auth.protectedResourceMetadata());\n+app.get(\"/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp\", async () => auth.protectedResourceMetadata());\n+\n+app.all(config.MCP_PATH, async (request, reply) => {\n+  try {\n+    await auth.authenticate(request, [\"workspace.read\"]);\n+  } catch (error) {\n+    const statusCode = typeof error === \"object\" && error && \"statusCode\" in error ? Number(error.statusCode) : 401;\n+    reply.header(\"WWW-Authenticate\", `Bearer resource_metadata=\"${config.PUBLIC_BASE_URL}/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource\"`);\n+    return reply.code(statusCode).send({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unauthorized\" });\n+  }\n+\n+  const sessionIdHeader = request.headers[\"mcp-session-id\"];\n+  const sessionId = typeof sessionIdHeader === \"string\" ? sessionIdHeader : undefined;\n+  let session = sessionId ? sessions.get(sessionId) : undefined;\n+\n+  if (request.method === \"POST\" && !session && isInitializeRequest(request.body)) {\n+    let transport: StreamableHTTPServerTransport;\n+    const server = createMcpServer(services);\n+    transport = new StreamableHTTPServerTransport({\n+      sessionIdGenerator: () => randomUUID(),\n+      onsessioninitialized: (id) => sessions.set(id, { server, transport }),\n+      onsessionclosed: (id) => sessions.delete(id)\n+    });\n+    await server.connect(transport);\n+    session = { server, transport };\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!session) {\n+    return reply.code(400).send({ jsonrpc: \"2.0\", error: { code: -32000, message: \"Missing or invalid MCP session\" }, id: null });\n+  }\n+\n+  reply.hijack();\n+  await session.transport.handleRequest(request.raw, reply.raw, request.body);\n+});\n+\n+app.setErrorHandler((error, _request, reply) => {\n+  app.log.error(error);\n+  if (!reply.sent) void reply.code(500).send({ error: \"Internal server error\" });\n+});\n+\n+await app.listen({ host: config.HOST, port: config.PORT });\n+\n+const shutdown = async (): Promise<void> => {\n+  await app.close();\n+  for (const { server, transport } of sessions.values()) {\n+    await transport.close();\n+    await server.close();\n+  }\n+  database.close();\n+};\n+\n+process.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => { void shutdown().finally(() => process.exit(0)); });\n+process.on(\"SIGINT\", () => { void shutdown().finally(() => process.exit(0)); });\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
)

[REASONING]
**Designing Dockerfiles and Compose setup**

[REASONING]
**Planning Docker socket mounting for gateway**

<!-- -->

[ASSISTANT]
The core gateway now type-checks with the current MCP SDK and includes realpath containment, isolated Git worktrees, SQLite persistence, audit/redaction, asynchronous container tasks, cancellation, artifact indexing, and OAuth/JWKS validation. I’m moving into the deployable layer now: versioned runner images, portable Compose, systemd/Cloudflare templates, fixtures, and acceptance tests.

[REASONING]
**Designing Dockerfiles and Compose setup**

[REASONING]

infra/systemd/gpt-dev-backup.service infra/systemd/gpt-dev-backup.timer /etc/systemd/system/\n+systemctl daemon-reload\n+systemctl enable gpt-dev-gateway.service gpt-dev-backup.timer\n+\n*** Add File: \"kernel=$(uname -srmo)\"\n+echo \"architecture=$(uname -m)\"\n+echo \"os_release=\"\n+cat /etc/os-release\n+echo \"cpu_count=$(nproc)\"\n+free -h\n+df -hT /\n+command -v docker >/dev/null && docker version || true\n+command -v podman >/dev/null && podman version || true\n+command -v cloudflared >/dev/null && cloudflared --version || true\n+command -v git >/dev/null && git --version || true\n+ss )
